Initial Challenge: Placeholder: every team member does 10 star jumps at the gate.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: win a best-of-3 rock paper scissors against a member of another team.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: find and photograph 3 different types of leaf.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: build a freestanding stick tower at least knee height.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: both team members hug a tree for 30 seconds.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: identify 3 bird sounds or spot 3 different birds.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: both team members cartwheel (or attempt to) across the clearing.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: throw a welly further than a member of another team.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: dig up (or find) something interesting and show another team.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: recite a tongue twister 3 times fast without a mistake.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: collect 10 pieces of kindling and stack them neatly.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: toast a marshmallow to a perfect golden brown, judged by a neutral player.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: balance an object on your head while walking 20 paces.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: catch 5 thrown grapes in your mouth in a row.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: sing a campfire song loud enough for another team to hear.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: hold a plank for 60 seconds.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: score a goal/point in any game currently set up here.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: win a three-legged race lap against another team pair.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: do your best fox impression and get it on video.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: build a den big enough for one teammate to hide inside.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: play hide and seek — one teammate hides for 2 minutes while the other counts.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: make a bow and arrow from found materials that fires at least 2 metres.

Initial Challenge: Placeholder: hoot loudly enough that another team hears and acknowledges you.
Control Challenge: Placeholder: stand perfectly still and silent for 2 minutes while the other teams may try to make you laugh.
